articles.title: Gold and silver extend rebound but concerns over volatility linger
articles.summary: Precious metals prices have rebounded strongly after a fall of nearly 10% for gold on Friday, and a 30% collapse in silver prices that marked the metal's worst one-day performance since 1980.

articles.title: FTSE 100 live: GSK posts results, gold price back above $5000
articles.summary: FTSE 100 Live 04 February: GSK posts results, Beazley backs £8bn Zurich deal -

articles.title: FTSE 100 live: Index record as gold rebounds, AG Barr buys Fentimans
articles.summary: FTSE 100 Live 03 February: New index record as gold rebounds, AG Barr buys Fentimans -

articles.title: FTSE 100 soars to fresh high despite metal price rout: Gold falls another 9% while silver slumps 16%
articles.summary: The Footsie ended up 1.2%, or 118.02 points, at 10,341.56 even as UK-listed precious metal miners and oil giants slid thanks to the commodities downturn.

articles.title: Gold Price
articles.summary: The shocking volatility in metal markets last week hasn't deterred JPMorgan from its bullish call for gold to hit $6,300 this year.
